date.note: Users under 13 cannot access Rwendo. Users 13–17 have some features restricted.

blocked.title: You need to be 18+
blocked.body: Rwendo currently requires users to be 18 or older to access all features — including the AI companion.
blocked.family_plan_body:
We're building a Family Plan that allows users aged 13–17 (or 16+ in Australia) to access Rwendo with parental consent.

Here's how it will work:
• Parent downloads Rwendo
• Parent completes identity verification
• Parent adds your email and generates a code
• You enter the code to access your account
• Parent can review your activity at any time

onboarding.connection_placeholder:
e.g. "My grandmother in Harare"
"My partner's family"

Leave blank to skip.
